name: MTT Cell Viability Assay

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 96-well plate at appropriate density

note.en: 5,000–10,000 cells/well for 24–72 h assay (100 µL complete medium). Add PBS to outer wells to prevent evaporation. Include: untreated control (6 wells), blank (medium only, no cells, 3 wells), treatment groups (3–6 wells each).
note.zh: 5,000–10,000 细胞/孔（100 µL 完全培养基），24–72 h 检测。外围孔加 PBS 防蒸发。设：未处理对照（6 孔）、空白（仅培养基，无细胞，3 孔）、处理组（每组 3–6 孔）。

components.name: 2. Incubate overnight for adherent cells to attach (37°C, 5% CO₂)

note.en: Suspension cells: proceed to treatment same day.
note.zh: 悬浮细胞：当天接种后直接处理。

note.en: Use 3–7 concentrations spanning 0.001–100× IC₅₀ (estimate). Replace medium for adherent cells; for suspension add drug directly. DMSO vehicle ≤0.1% final concentration.
note.zh: 使用 3–7 个跨度 0.001–100× IC₅₀ 的浓度（估算）。贴壁细胞换液；悬浮细胞直接加药。DMSO 终浓度 ≤0.1%。

note.en: Choose endpoint: 24 h (acute toxicity), 48 h (standard), 72 h (slow-growing cells).
note.zh: 选择终点：24 h（急性毒性）、48 h（标准）、72 h（慢生长细胞）。

components.name: 5. Add MTT reagent: 10 µL of 5 mg/mL MTT per well (= 0.5 mg/well)

note.en: MTT stock (mtt_reagent): 5 mg/mL in sterile PBS, 0.22 µm filtered, 4°C dark, use within 4 weeks. Protect from light. Do NOT add to blank wells if using OD-only reading.
note.zh: MTT 储液（mtt_reagent）：5 mg/mL in PBS，0.22 µm 过滤，4°C 避光，4 周内使用。避光加入。空白孔若只读 OD 可不加。

components.name: 6. Incubate 2–4 h at 37°C (monitor formazan purple crystal formation)

note.en: Check microscopically at 2 h: purple crystals visible in live cells = ready. Avoid >4 h (crystals dissolve back). Remove ALL medium carefully by aspiration (formazan crystals adhere to cells).
note.zh: 2 h 后镜检：活细胞内见紫色结晶 = 可以终止。不超过 4 h（结晶溶解）。小心吸去全部培养基（甲臜结晶贴附在细胞上）。

components.name: 7. Aspirate medium carefully; dissolve formazan crystals with 100 µL DMSO per well

note.en: Ensure complete medium removal before adding DMSO (residual medium gives inaccurate reading). Alternative solvents: 0.04 N HCl in isopropanol, or SDS-HCl (10% SDS + 0.01 N HCl).
note.zh: 加 DMSO 前确保培养基完全去除（残留培养基导致读数不准）。替代溶剂：异丙醇中 0.04 N HCl，或 SDS-HCl（10% SDS + 0.01 N HCl）。

components.name: 8. Shake plate on orbital shaker 10–15 min (ensure complete dissolution)

note.en: Undissolved crystals give heterogeneous OD. Check visually before reading.
note.zh: 结晶未完全溶解会导致 OD 不均匀。读板前目视确认。

note.en: Read within 1 h of dissolution (formazan is unstable in DMSO at RT). Reference wavelength 630–690 nm corrects for non-specific absorbance. A₅₇₀ 0.1–1.5 is linear range.
note.zh: 溶解后 1 h 内读板（甲臜在 DMSO 中 RT 下不稳定）。参考波长 630–690 nm 校正非特异吸光度。A₅₇₀ 0.1–1.5 为线性范围。

note.en: IC₅₀: fit dose-response curve using 4-PL logistic equation (GraphPad Prism, R drc package). Plot log[drug] vs % viability.
note.zh: IC₅₀：4 参数 logistic 方程拟合剂量-效应曲线（GraphPad Prism、R drc 包）。绘制 log[药物] vs % 活力图。

notes.en: MTT measures mitochondrial dehydrogenase activity (mainly succinate dehydrogenase). Caveats: (1) Some compounds (antioxidants, CoQ10) directly reduce MTT = false high viability; (2) Highly colored compounds interfere at 570 nm; (3) DMSO can be toxic to remaining cells (irreversible). Alternatives: CCK-8 (water-soluble, re-readable), Resazurin (resazurin_assay, non-toxic), LDH release (cytotoxicity). Cannot distinguish cytostasis from cytotoxicity without cell count.
notes.zh: MTT 测线粒体脱氢酶活性（主要是琥珀酸脱氢酶）。注意：(1) 部分化合物（抗氧化剂、CoQ10）直接还原 MTT = 假阳性高活力；(2) 强色化合物干扰 570 nm；(3) DMSO 对残余细胞有毒（不可逆）。替代方案：CCK-8（水溶性，可重复读）、Resazurin（resazurin_assay，无毒）、LDH 释放（细胞毒性）。不做细胞计数无法区分细胞抑制和细胞毒性。

ref: Mosmann (1983) J Immunol Methods 65:55–63; van Meerloo et al. (2011) Methods Mol Biol 731:237–245; Riss et al. (2004) Assay Guidance Manual (NCATS)
